title: Samsung Puts Gemini on the Face: 50g Galaxy Glasses Unveiled, No Screen but Equipped with a Full-Time AI Eye
excerpt: Samsung has finally taken action to put a large model into a pair of glasses. On the evening of July 22, Samsung officially unveiled its first AI smart glasses,
content_html:
Samsung has finally taken action to put a large model into a pair of glasses. On the evening of July 22, Samsung officially unveiled its first AI smart glasses, Galaxy Glasses, marking the company's first foray into AI hardware on the face.

The glasses were not developed in isolation by Samsung alone. It was jointly developed by Samsung, Google, Gentle Monster, and Warby Parker. Running the Android XR system, it deeply integrates Google's Gemini multimodal large model natively, with the clear goal of creating an all-day, hands-free visual intelligent assistant.

What is most notable is that it has given up the screen. The entire device has a lightweight appearance close to regular optical glasses, weighing around 50 grams. It does not have a traditional AR display but instead uses high-definition cameras on both sides of the frame to capture real-world images, sending visual information to Gemini for recognition and analysis. The processed results are then read aloud to the user through the audio unit inside the lens. This trade-off directly results in a lower weight and power consumption, making long-term daily wear possible.

Supporting this experience is a dedicated chip. Galaxy Glasses is equipped with Qualcomm Snapdragon AR1Gen1, featuring four Arm cores with a maximum frequency of 1.9GHz, and a 12-megapixel image sensor. It supports 30 frames per second full HD video recording. The frame includes dual privacy indicator lights, which illuminate simultaneously when recording, clearly informing people around about the recording status.

The multimodal capabilities of Gemini are applied to three practical scenarios: office work, travel, and communication. During meetings, it can automatically capture whiteboard text and instantly organize and archive it into Samsung Notes. When going out, it provides real-time voice navigation and real-time language translation for multiple countries. Instead of lifting the phone, the AI will automatically summarize and read out messages. During calls, it can even share a first-person view of the live video hands-free. It also has context memory capabilities, retaining multi-turn task information to reduce repeated operations.

For interaction, there are two solutions. Basic operations are completed through the touch-sensitive area on the right temple. Sliding adjusts the volume, tapping answers the call, and pressing long starts recording. If paired with the Galaxy Watch9 series watch, it can further unlock air gesture control, freeing up both hands completely. In terms of battery life, the glasses themselves can be used continuously for 9 hours on a single charge, and the accompanying charging and storage case can provide 7 additional full charges, making it sufficient for a whole day out.

sentences.zh: 基本操作通过右侧镜腿上的触摸感应区域完成。

sentences.zh: 续航方面，眼镜本身一次充电可连续使用9小时，附带的充电收纳盒可额外提供7次充满电，足以满足一整天的外出。

content_html_zh:
三星终于采取行动，将大型模型放入一副眼镜中。 7月22日晚，三星正式推出旗下首款AI智能眼镜Galaxy Glasses，标志着该公司首次进军人脸AI硬件领域。

这款眼镜并不是三星单独开发的。 它由三星、谷歌、Gentle Monster 和 Warby Parker 联合开发。 运行Android XR系统，原生深度集成谷歌Gemini多模态大模型，目标明确，打造全天候、免提的视觉智能助手。

最值得注意的是它放弃了屏幕。 整机外观轻巧，接近普通光学眼镜，重量约50克。 它没有传统的AR显示屏，而是利用画面两侧的高清摄像头捕捉现实世界的图像，将视觉信息发送给Gemini进行识别和分析。 然后，处理后的结果通过镜头内的音频单元大声朗读给用户。 这种权衡直接导致了重量和功耗的降低，从而使长期日常佩戴成为可能。

支持这种体验的是专用芯片。 Galaxy Glasses配备了Qualcomm Snapdragon AR1Gen1，具有四个Arm内核，最高频率为1.9GHz，以及12兆像素图像传感器。 它支持每秒30帧的全高清视频录制。 该框架具有双隐私指示灯，在录音时同时亮起，清楚地告知周围的人录音状态。

Gemini的多模态能力应用于办公、出行、通讯三大实际场景。 在会议期间，它可以自动捕获白板文本并立即将其整理并存档到三星笔记中。 外出时，提供多国实时语音导航和实时语言翻译。 人工智能会自动总结并读出消息，而不是拿起手机。 在通话过程中，它甚至可以免提分享实时视频的第一人称视图。 它还具有上下文记忆功能，保留多轮任务信息以减少重复操作。

对于交互，有两种解决方案。 基本操作通过右侧镜腿上的触摸感应区域完成。 滑动调节音量，点击接听电话，长按开始录音。 如果搭配Galaxy Watch9系列手表，可以进一步解锁空中手势控制，彻底解放双手。 续航方面，眼镜本身一次充电可连续使用9小时，附带的充电收纳盒可额外提供7次充满电，足以满足一整天的外出。
